## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature (`feature/`)
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix/`, `bug/`, `bugfix/`)
- [ ] Hotfix (`hotfix/`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor/`)
- [ ] Chore / maintenance (`chore/`)
- [ ] Tests (`test/`)
- [ ] Release (`release/`)

## Breaking changes

- [ ] This PR introduces a breaking change (public API, config, migrations, etc.)

<!-- If checked, describe the impact and any upgrade steps needed -->

## Related issues

<!-- Link issues with: Closes #123 -->

## How was this tested?

<!-- e.g. `composer check`, plus which countries/locales you verified manually -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Branch name follows the convention above (CI validates this automatically)
- [ ] PR is focused on a single concern
- [ ] Tests added or updated where relevant
- [ ] `README.md` / docs updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Ran `composer check` locally (`pint:check` + `test`) — or `composer pint` to auto-fix style
- [ ] If this adds/edits country data or translations: source cited below and reviewed by a fluent speaker where possible

## Commits (optional)

We encourage [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/), but it is not required.

Examples:

- `feat(i18n): add Turkish language seeder`
- `fix(seeders): correct Arabic country names`
- `docs: document custom database connection`

## Additional notes

<!-- Screenshots, edge cases, anything else reviewers should know -->
